title: The Enderwoman
description: A bit more than meets the eye. Finally adds what people always wanted out of the endermen.
body:
# The Enderwoman Mod

I PROMISE THIS IS **NOT** _JUST_ A MOD THAT ADDS ENDERWOMEN!

This mod does a couple of things: it gets rid of the old Endermen and replaces them with a new species called Enderkin, and it adds a couple of new items that mess with teleporting and projectiles.

***

## So, What's Actually New?

### 1\. The Enderkin 

Goodbye, regular Endermen. They've been fully replaced by two (for now) types of **Enderkin**:

*   **The Enderkin Beta**
    
    *   The shorter, more common one.
    *   Acts pretty much like the old Endermen you're used to.
*   **The Enderkin Alpha** ~~**(the more feminine one):**~~
    
    *   This is the larger, stronger, and way agressive.
    *   They make up about 30% of all Enderkin you'll find.
    *   Higher chances of dropping their horns.
    
     

 

***

### 2\. The Horn Dagger (For Fancy Teleporting)

                                                                                                    ![knife.png](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1396126/description_dd61fa64-1395-4708-a8e0-dd1f08592df0.png)

 

Craft this using one of those Enderkin horns you collected.

*   **Throw it** at a wall or the ground, and you'll teleport right to that spot.
*   **Hit a mob or player** with it (by throwing or just stabbing), and you'll teleport directly behind them.

It's powerful for moving around or getting the drop on someone, but it doesn't last forever, so make your throws count.

***

### 3\. The Spatial Lock Anchor (The "No Fun" Zone)

                                                                                             ![spatial lock anchor.png](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1396126/description_e8551740-11f5-4e8c-82c9-479f3a6a1a05.png)

You can find these things hidden in Bastion Remnants, or you can craft one yourself.

*   Once you place it down, it creates a big area where **Enderkin cannot teleport**.
*   It also **grabs any projectile** that flies into its area (arrows, fireballs, etc.) and **shoots it right back at whoever fired it**. (You can tweak what it catches in the config file).

**What this means for you:** You can finally build a base without Endermen teleporting in and stealing your blocks. It's also great for making PvP arenas weird or setting up creative farms.

***

**Note:** This mod is still a work in progress! More features are planned.

**You are allowed** to use this in modpacks, make videos about it, or make addons for it.

If you run into bugs or crashes, let me know on Discord: **ashagoob**
